headlines.title: US and Iran 'very close' to deal but 'not there yet', Vance says
headlines.description: US officials earlier told the BBC that the framework of a ceasefire extension deal had been agreed, pending the approval of Trump and Iran's leadership.

headlines.title: Moment Blue Origin rocket explodes during test in Florida
headlines.description: A Blue Origin New Glenn rocket exploded on a launch pad at Cape Canaveral in Florida on Thursday night.

headlines.title: SAS troops accused of war crimes not referred to police over morale fears, inquiry hears
headlines.description: This meant military police did not learn for years of allegations of extra-judicial killings.

headlines.title: Top UK chefs call for 10% VAT cut for pubs and restaurants
headlines.description: Tom Kerridge, Yotam Ottolenghi, Ravneet Gill and Simon Rogan told BBC Newsnight VAT should be slashed to 10% to ease mounting pressure on the hospitality industry.

headlines.title: Two charged after bystander fatally shot outside bar
headlines.description: Shanice Brookes, 30, was an "innocent bystander" when she was shot in Sheffield, police say.

headlines.title: Inquest opens for three sisters who died in sea off Brighton
headlines.description: Jane Adetoro, Christina Walters, and Rebecca Walters died off Brighton beach on  May 13.

headlines.title: Epstein survivors lack faith in UK police investigating Andrew, says lawyer
headlines.description: A lawyer representing survivors says his clients lack confidence in the treatment they would receive in the UK.

headlines.title: Are 'heat spikes' becoming more common?
headlines.description: The heatwave that has gripped much of England and Wales this week brought with it record May temperatures. But it has also been exceptional for how quickly it developed as Simon King explains.

headlines.title: Pharmacies in England to prescribe more medication from autumn
headlines.description: The £340m deal will see five common conditions added to the list of things pharmacists can prescribe medication for from this autumn.

headlines.title: AI will be used to estimate age of asylum seekers from next year
headlines.description: The Home Office says the tool will make it easier to identify adult migrants "attempting to game the system".

headlines.title: I spent most of career in pain because of degenerative condition, says Nadal
headlines.description: Rafael Nadal had one of the greatest tennis careers the game has ever seen. He also spent nearly all of it in pain.

headlines.title: Exploding rocket casts doubts over Nasa's Moon plans
headlines.description: Explosion of Blue Origin rocket is a setback for the company and for Nasa's Moon plans.

headlines.title: 'I forgot what it's like to be outside': Intensive care ward opens on rooftop
headlines.description: The outdoor ward, at King's College Hospital in London, will monitor how much it boosts the recovery of seriously ill patients.

headlines.title: Weekly quiz: Which tennis star dazzled the French Open with an 'Eiffel Tower' dress?
headlines.description: How much attention did you pay to what happened in the world over the past seven days?

headlines.title: Trial of 'Ulm 5' activists: How Germany is dealing with its Palestine Action case
headlines.description: The case has sparked a debate in Germany - a long-standing supporter of Israel - about how to deal with pro-Palestinian protesters.

headlines.title: California teen wins US spelling bee - but could you compete? Take our quiz
headlines.description: Nine kids have battled it out in the 2026 Scripps National Spelling Bee finals - can you spell as well as they did?

headlines.title: Survival before safety for Delhi's poor as temperatures hit 45C
headlines.description: As temperatures peak, Delhi’s informal workers continue working despite growing health risks.

headlines.title: How did this novel about food win a Booker Prize this year?
headlines.description: Taiwan Travelogue is the first novel translated from Mandarin Chinese to win the prestigious award.

headlines.title: CMAT shares 'deep sadness' over body-shaming abuse after Radio 1 Big Weekend set
headlines.description: The Irish singer says she has experienced a "difficult" few days after performing at the music festival.

headlines.title: Kenya court halts opening of US Ebola quarantine facility in the country
headlines.description: A 50-bed isolation unit in Kenya for US citizens was due to open on Friday, a US official said.

headlines.title: 'I was raped by a childhood friend - I want others to know what he did'
headlines.description: Hayley Watkins waives her anonymity to call for a publicly-accessible sex offenders register.

headlines.title: Charity hikers 'really angry' at being booed for dodging queues at Yr Wyddfa summit
headlines.description: The pair say they were jeered when they avoided queues as they just wanted to tap the trig point.

headlines.title: Police watchdog probes handcuffing of murder victim
headlines.description: Henry Nowak, 18, was initially treated as a suspect by police despite suffering five stab wounds.

headlines.title: Netanyahu says he has directed IDF to increase control of Gaza to 70%
headlines.description: The expansion in control by Israel would contradict the terms of the ceasefire  Israel and Hamas agreed to in October 2025.

headlines.title: Mother-in-law of Indian bride whose death set off media frenzy arrested
headlines.description: Twisha Sharma's death on 12 May has sparked rival claims of murder and suicide and dominated headlines.

headlines.title: BBC News app
headlines.description: Top stories, breaking news, live reporting, and follow news topics that match your interests

headlines.title: Why Can’t Young People Get Jobs?
headlines.description: Major report warns risk of a ‘lost generation’?

headlines.title: Are the Democrats ready to win in Texas?
headlines.description: The Senate race in Texas could determine which party controls Congress.

headlines.title: Michael Caine and Glenda Jackson star in a heart-warming tale
headlines.description: WWII veteran Bernard sneaks out of his care home to attend the 70th anniversary of D-Day

headlines.title: A powerful film about the rise and tragic fall of a wrestling family
headlines.description: Based on a true story of brothers who made history in the world of professional wrestling.

headlines.title: Is Grand Slam singles woe for British players a worry for Wimbledon?
headlines.description: The French Open is the third Grand Slam in a row that no British singles players made the second week. Is it a worry for Wimbledon?

headlines.title: Konate set to leave Liverpool on free transfer
headlines.description: Ibrahima Konate is set to leave Liverpool for free when his current contract expires in June.

headlines.title: I spent most of career in pain because of degenerative condition - Nadal
headlines.description: Rafael Nadal had one of the greatest tennis careers the game has ever seen. He also spent nearly all of it in pain.

headlines.title: Emotional Littler underlines greatness after almost quitting Premier League
headlines.description: An emotional Luke Littler reveals he almost quit the Premier League after he beat Luke Humphries in an epic final at The O2.

headlines.title: From non-league to Champions League - Raya's fairytale rise
headlines.description: Twelve years ago Arsenal keeper David Raya made his debut for non-league Southport; on Saturday he plays in the Champions League final - this is how he got there.

headlines.title: Messi to represent Argentina at sixth World Cup
headlines.description: Lionel Messi will play in a sixth World Cup as he captains holders Argentina at the 2026 tournament.

headlines.title: Hodgkinson ready for 'battle of world records' in London
headlines.description: Keely Hodgkinson says she would "love" to break the long-standing women's 800m world record on home soil at the London Diamond League in July.
